name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or platform

labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature or platform you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve.

## Proposed Solution

If you have ideas on how to implement this, describe them here.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Platform (if applicable)

- [ ] GitLab
- [ ] GitHub
- [ ] New platform: ___________
